calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-029 / MECH-256 event-conditioned comparator (EXQ-479 calibrated curriculum)
items.note: Successor to V3-EXQ-433c (FAIL inconclusive_insufficient_events: agent_caused_hazard trials=0 in all 4 seeds; C0 protective gate fired). Root cause: 433c's uncalibrated curriculum params (interval=25, num_hazards=3, hazard_harm=0.04, adjacent_only=False) predated EXQ-479 substrate validation -- non-adjacent injections rarely created adjacency for the scripted walker, and high hazard_harm killed the agent before the curriculum tick fired. EXQ-479 (substrate validation, 2026-04-24) demonstrated PASS at hazard-event granularity with calibrated params (interval=10, num_hazards=2, hazard_harm=0.02, adjacent_only=True). EXQ-433d adopts EXQ-479's calibrated curriculum + 433c's three-phase pipeline (P0 encoder warmup, P1 interventional E2_harm_s training, balanced eval) verbatim. STEPS_PER_EP bumped 120 -> 200 to match 479. Acceptance: C0 trials_sufficient_gate (>=3/4 seeds with both agent_caused AND env_caused trials >=20), C1 forward_r2 mean >=0.9 (3/4 seeds), C2 attenuation_ratio in [0.2,0.8] (3/4 seeds), C3 approach_snr >5.0 (3/4 seeds). C0 protective gate preserved -- inconclusive_insufficient_events on FAIL prevents spurious downgrade of SD-029 / MECH-256.

items.title: SD-016 Path 1 diversification loss 4-arm (auxiliary symmetry-breaking pressure)
items.note: Successor to V3-EXQ-418d (4-arm writepath modes). 418d FAILed: attn_entropy=ln(16) regardless of write mode (off/train_only/sense_only/both); read+write gradients alone cannot break ContextMemory slot symmetry. Path 1 substrate change: auxiliary mean-squared-off-diagonal-cosine diversification loss on slot vectors. 4 arms: A0_off (baseline), A1_writes_only (replicates 418d A2 sanity), A2_div_only (loss alone), A3_writes_plus_div (full bootstrap). Acceptance C1 attn_entropy<2.65 AND C2 div>0.10 ALL 3 SEEDS AND C3 behavioural delta>=0.20 AND C4 A1 replicates 418d FAIL. C2 raised from 2/3 to 3/3 because 418d showed bimodal seed pattern -- substrate-level fix must escape collapse on every seed. Smoke verified: slot_div climbs 0.2->0.5->1.0 across arms; wiring confirmed. See REE_assembly/docs/architecture/sd_016_writepath_v3_diversification_loss.md.

items.title: MECH-269b symmetric V_s gating on E1/E2 cortical rollouts (Q-040 factorial)
items.note: Q-040 factorial: substrate-readiness diagnostic for MECH-269b cortical-side V_s gate (read-side consumer of MECH-269 Phase 1 per_stream_vs at the E1 sensory predictor and E2_harm_a per-tick forward call sites). Two arms (ON_OFF / ON_ON) hold use_broadcast_override + use_dacc + drive_weight=2.0 + full V_s invalidation circuit + use_vs_commit_release ON; the only manipulated variable is use_vs_rollout_gating. Acceptance: C1 (ON gate fires > 0 holds across e1+e2 streams; OFF reports 0), C2 (ON approach_commit_count > 0 in >= 2/3 seeds; OFF reproduces EXQ-483 zero baseline), C3 (ON dacc_score_bias_mean > 0; OFF approximately zero). PASS = C1 AND C2 AND C3. FAIL on C2/C3 with C1 PASSing -> Q-040 FAIL branch points evidence at MECH-295 liking-bridge as dominant blocker. experiment_purpose=diagnostic. 80 warmup x 5 eval x 200 steps x 3 seeds x 2 arms; ~50-55 min/arm with full V_s circuit overhead. Smoke verified bit-identical OFF and gate fires under forced low V_s (substrate landing 2026-04-26). See REE_assembly/docs/architecture/mech_269b_vs_rollout_gating.md.

items.title: MECH-295 drive -> liking -> approach_cue bridge validation (6 sub-tests)
items.note: Substrate-landing diagnostic for MECH-295 weak-reading bridge. Six sub-tests: UC1 module-importable; UC2 master-OFF agent.mech295_bridge is None (bit-identical OFF); UC3 30-tick env loop with forced drive=0.8 + benefit=0.4 -> n_write_fires > 0; UC4 cue-side compute returns negative monotone bias under elevated drive (more proximity -> more negative); UC5 SEVERED-BRIDGE COLLAPSE: cue gain=0 produces exactly-zero bias even with drive=0.9 + write side intact (the falsifiable signature for the weak-necessity reading -- without an intact link, drive amplification cannot reach approach); UC6 MECH-094 simulation_mode=True returns zero on both sides and counters do not advance. PASS = all 6 UCs PASS. Behavioural EXQ-483-style approach_commit recovery (4-arm with the orexin substrate ON plus this bridge in arms 2-3) is deferred to a successor once V3-EXQ-490 (MECH-269b) lands. experiment_purpose=diagnostic. claim_ids tags MECH-295 as primary; SD-012 / SD-014 / SD-015 / MECH-117 are architectural prerequisites only (per-claim direction non_contributory). Smoke verified all 6 sub-tests PASS via --dry-run 2026-04-26. See REE_assembly/docs/architecture/mech_295_drive_liking_approach_bridge.md.
